mentions.note: Insurance, reinsurance, oil & gas, railroads; mosaic of businesses solid but people own it for Buffett; now that he stepped down, investors may retire along with him or avoid capital gains taxes; lacking visible catalyst post-Buffett.
Down 45% vs. S&P 500 over 12 months but Greg Abel has strong hand and assets are second to none; don't sell now.
Preferred insurance play over CCC Intelligent Solutions; higher quality operator with proven track record.
Down 12% since Warren Buffett's retirement; hold for one year minimum before judging new leadership; too early to make call; hope management stays open-minded on holdings.
Not participating in recent rally despite heavy exposure to oil (Occidental Petroleum, Chevron); Warren Buffett premium now gone post-succession; market still adjusting to leadership transition.
New CEO Greg Abel expected to deliver Saturday earnings; more low-key style than Buffett; listen for words of wisdom from CEO running business for shareholder returns.
